scope: wave2 fan-out gap-close: the 5 legacy-parity read streams, both legacy auth modes (access_token bearer, priority; M2M client_id/client_secret oauth2_client_credentials with audience extra_param, fallback), and 0-indexed pagination are now fully migrated (the two prior ENGINE_GAP blockers are closed via the S4 engine mini-wave). The full Management API surface (rules, actions, hooks, tenants settings, logs, device credentials, etc.) remains out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: M2M client-credentials token exchange, driven by base.auth's oauth2_client_credentials candidate; not a syncable stream in its own right, exercised implicitly whenever client_id/client_secret auth is used
tenant-wide settings mutation, not a syncable read
deletes user data; not a syncable read
